You already know, or should know, when coming into this there will be a little bit of the community that is racist, homophobic, or toxic. But that’s for every game. This game is well formed, has great staff, and great opportunities! I am a finger painter for this game, and I’ve been playing this game for a long while, yet I’ve only just now decided to make a review. This game is great, most kind people, helpful users, and more. If you’re looking for a good GT Clone with no mods, this is the game for you!
